summary: Smoke-tested new ContextDayStrip components on Multi-Day and 8-Day Inspection scenarios. All assertions passed: prior/next strips render at the correct positions with correct styling, and Combined / Split Sleeper categories correctly show no context strips.
verified_behaviors: Login Badge 042 / PIN 1234 still works (PIN + Enter).

Multi-Day pre-scenario: [data-testid=prior-day-strip] renders ABOVE Day 1 grid (prior_top=439 < day1_top=716). Class includes bg-[#F8FAFC], border, dashed, border-[#CBD5E1], opacity-90. 'Context · readonly' label present.
Multi-Day M3 walk-through: after Day 1 violation answered, Day 2 grid appears AND next-day-strip becomes visible (questionIdx>=2 gating). Strip styling matches prior strip.
8-Day Inspection pre-scenario: prior-day-strip with label 'Day before Day −7' renders above [data-testid=day-stepper] (p_top=571 < s_top=849).

8-Day initial (phase=days): next-day-strip absent. After running E1 through all 8 days (incl. one off-day skip), phase advances to 'cycle' and next-day-strip appears ABOVE [data-testid=cycle-step] (n_top=913 < c_top=1190) with label 'Day after Day 0'.

Visual: context strips have light bg-[#F8FAFC] with dashed CBD5E1 border + 'Context · readonly' badge — visually distinct from active dark-headered day cards (confirmed via screenshot of cycle phase).
Regression: Combined and Split Sleeper categories show 0 prior-day-strip and 0 next-day-strip (correct, they don't apply).
critical_code_review_comments: ContextDayStrip is duplicated verbatim (~20 lines) in MultiDayRunner.js and EightDayRunner.js. Acceptable for now but candidate for extraction to /app/frontend/src/components/hos/ContextDayStrip.js to keep DRY.
Both runner files exceed 500 lines (MultiDayRunner ~503, EightDayRunner ~660). Approaching 700-line threshold; consider splitting Day/Cycle/OOS subcomponents into separate files in a future refactor.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ContextDayStrip feature shipped and verified on iter 36. The next-day strip in MultiDayRunner is gated by questionIdx>=2 (renders alongside Day 2 grid) — it does NOT wait for Day 2 violation to be answered, which matches the agent_to_agent note. End-to-end multiday and 8-day flows already validated in iter 34 and 35; this iteration only smoke-tested the new strips.
